description: Welcome your little one with our Soft Touch newborn baby hats, featuring classic white, sweet pink and gentle blue colours that are trusted newborn essentials for new parents. These carefully crafted beanies mirror the comfort and design of traditional hospital hats, with both classic and knotted styles available to suit your preference. Made from premium 100% cotton, our baby hats provide the ideal balance of softness and protection that your newborn needs. The classic design ensures a secure yet gentle fit, making them perfect for daily wear from hospital to home. Choose between our traditional style for timeless simplicity, or our trendy knotted design for a modern touch. These hats are an essential addition to any hospital bag and make thoughtful newborn baby gifts and baby shower gifts. Easy to care for and durably made, our baby beanies maintain their softness and shape through multiple washes. Whether you're preparing for your new arrival or searching for the perfect baby gift, these beautifully coloured hats are a practical and cherished addition to any newborn's first wardrobe. Add these baby essentials for newborn baby hats to your basket now and ensure your little one has the gentle protection they need from day one. A trusted choice for those precious first moments and beyond.
